prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with 3,500+ calorie requirement and 60% carbs, 25% protein, 15% fat macronutrient split

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3,500+ calories across all meals
Macronutrient distribution meets 60% carbs, 25% protein, 15% fat targets (±5% tolerance)
Includes pre-training, during-training (if applicable), and post-training meal timing recommendations
All meals are dairy-free and practical for single-day consumption
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3,500+ calories with specific macronutrient ratios (60% carbs, 25% protein, 15% fat) and timing around training sessions
